notes: IMA Financial Group is an insurance agency with a strong focus on employee development and collaboration. The company has a diverse range of job openings, but the majority are in client-facing roles such as account executives, client managers, and client service representatives. There are a few tech-related roles, including AI Enablement Lead and AI Engineering Lead, but they are not the primary focus of the company.
